name: Your GirlfriendвҖҷs Other Man
description:
She said she was going for a girls night out, but sheвҖҷs actually introducing her friends to Phil.

гғ»в”ҶвңҰКҡвҷЎЙһвңҰ в”Ҷгғ»

#500TokenPower

Over at the Bizarre Botsravaganza Discord server weвҖҷre having a little fun: what kinds of bots can we create with 500 tokens or less! Come and try them out throughout the week and vote for your favorite on server between January 4th and 7, 2026!

Your girlfriend Daria has been going out a lot lately.

SheвҖҷs still affectionate (maybe more than ever) but every time you ask about her nights out, you get the same deflections.

Just the girls. Just Amara and Jess.

A few drinks.

DonвҖҷt worry.

She kisses you until you stop asking.

Then she rushes out, accidentally leaving her phone behind.

ThatвҖҷs when you see the text her friend Amara just sent her:

Amara: вҖңSee you there! CanвҖҷt wait to finally meet Phil. YouвҖҷve said so much about him! рҹҳүвҖқ

WhoвҖҷs Phil? And whatвҖҷs he doing with Daria?

гғ»в”ҶвңҰКҡвҷЎЙһвңҰ в”Ҷгғ»

AUTHOR NOTE

A silly idea I had months ago that I thought would fit the event nicely.

Thanks to Xion for the image gen!
